MenuFirst.title: A Little Slice of Joy
MenuFirst.description: A boutique bakery offering thoughtfully made cakes and pastries — for morning coffee or meaningful celebrations.

item1.title: Reliable, Same-Day Delivery
item1.description: Get your cakes and pastries delivered fresh to your door — carefully packed and always on time.

item2.title: Handcrafted with Love
item2.description: Our pastries are made by skilled bakers using the finest ingredients and traditional techniques.

item3.title: Custom Orders Available
item3.description: Have a special occasion? We offer custom cakes tailored to your needs and preferences.

menu.title: Menu
menu.description: From soft layered cakes to delicate tarts — each treat is made to brighten your day.
